page: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-44-standardlssd is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 44 vCPUs mapped to 22 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 352 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It includes 9663 GB of local NVMe SSD storage distributed across three drives, with no integrated GPU resources.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in specific multi-threaded and cryptographic tasks. The server achieves a strong rating in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 230.59 GB/sec and the PassMark CPU encryption test at 38,693.47. Image processing performance is also strong, scoring 15,894.0 on Geekbench. For large language model inference, the hardware demonstrates strong prompt processing speeds on small and medium models, though text generation performance drops significantly on larger 70B models, reflecting the lack of dedicated GPU acceleration.

This instance offers high resource density, combining substantial memory capacity with extensive local NVMe storage. This makes it highly qualitative in cost efficiency for workloads that require fast local scratch space alongside large memory footprints, avoiding the latency of network-attached storage. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive data processing, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and localized caching layers.
description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-44-standardlssd is a memory-optimized server configured with 44 vCPUs across 22 physical Intel Xeon 8481C cores operating at 2.7 GHz. It features 352 GB of RAM, establishing an 8 GB per core ratio, and bundles 9663 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Lacking a GPU, the instance relies on its CPU architecture, which supports advanced vector and matrix extensions. Benchmark results show strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, image processing, and cryptographic encryption. Conversely, text generation for large 70B models is a notable bottleneck. This server is designed for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads, such as large databases, data warehousing, and high-throughput localized data processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-44-standardlssd is a memory-optimized server with 44 vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 9663 GB local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-throughput database and data processing workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-44-standardlssd features 44 vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 9663 GB local NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server with high-capacity local NVMe storage designed for demanding database operations and data-intensive processing workloads.
bullet_points: 44 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processors at 2.7 GHz
352 GB of RAM providing 8 GB per core for memory-intensive tasks
9663 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Strong performance in cryptographic encryption and multi-threaded decompression
Optimized for large-scale databases, caching layers, and data processing
